sources.name: WebAIM Million 2025
sources.description: Automated evaluation of the homepages for the top one million websites in February 2025.

sources.name: HTTP Archive Web Almanac 2024
sources.description: Accessibility analysis based on HTTP Archive data and Lighthouse audits from the June 2024 dataset.

topViolations.name: Low contrast text
topViolations.description: Text does not meet the minimum contrast threshold.

topViolations.name: Missing alternative text
topViolations.description: Images do not provide an alternative text value.

topViolations.name: Missing form input labels
topViolations.description: Form controls do not have a programmatically associated label.

topViolations.name: Empty links
topViolations.description: Links do not expose discernible text or an accessible name.

topViolations.name: Empty buttons
topViolations.description: Buttons do not expose text or an accessible name.

topViolations.name: Missing document language
topViolations.description: The page does not identify its primary human language.
